prompt: The session sweeper is crashing in prod every time it actually has something to clean up: `RuntimeError: dictionary changed size during iteration`, out of SessionStore.prune_expired. Sweeps that find nothing expired run fine, which is why staging never caught it. Separately, QA says 'log out everywhere' is flaky — log out a user with three sessions and some of them survive; from the reports it looks like roughly every other one lives. python3 test_sessions.py hits both. Fix sessions.py without touching the test file, then run the tests to prove it.
